functions.name: sweetrpg_model_core.convert.model.to_document
documentation:
Convert a model object to a database document.

:param BaseModel model: The model object to convert. This instance must have a to_dict() method that returns
    a dictionary of the model data.
:param class document_class: The type of the document class to convert to. This class must accept kwargs
    in its initializer.
:returns: An instance of the document class, initialized with the model data.

functions.name: sweetrpg_model_core.convert.document.convert_document_property_value
documentation:
Convert a property value from "document" format to a "normal" value, e.g., a MongoDB object ID
(a dict with key '$oid') would be converted to just the ID value.

:param any value: The value to convert
:returns any: The converted value

functions.name: sweetrpg_model_core.convert.document.to_model
documentation:
Convert a database document to a model instance.

:param Document doc: The input document to convert. This instance must have a to_json() function
    that returns a dictionary of the document data.
:param class model_class: The type of model class to convert to. This class must accept kwargs
    in its initializer.
:returns: An instance of the model class, initialized with the document data.

functions.name: sweetrpg_model_core.convert.date.to_datetime
documentation:
Deserializes a database value to a Python datetime.
This function can be used as a callback for the Marshmallow {class}`fields.Function`
field type.

```
param any value

The source value to convert to a Python datetime object. This can
be a MongoDB , an ISO-formatted date/time
string, or a UTC unix timestamp value.

param str attr

The name of the attribute being deserialized.

param object data

The object associated.

param dict kwargs



return datetime.datetime

Python datetime object
```

functions.name: sweetrpg_model_core.convert.date.to_timestamp
documentation:
Serialize an object value to a MongoDB timestamp.
This function can be used as a callback for the Marshmallow {class}`fields.Function`
field type.

```
param any value

The source value to convert to a MongoDB . This
can be a  object, or a time/increment tuple.

param str attr

The name of the attribute being serialized.

param object obj

The object associated.

param dict kwargs



return bson.timestamp.Timestamp

MongoDB Timestamp object
```

variables.name: sweetrpg_model_core.model.base.__author__
documentation: Base objects for model and embedded model.

classes.name: sweetrpg_model_core.model.base.BaseModel

methods.name: sweetrpg_model_core.model.base.BaseModel.to_dict
documentation:
Returns a dictionary representation of the model object.

Returns:
    dict: A Python dictionary.

A base model with common methods for model types.

Do not subclass this; use `Model` or `EmbeddedModel` instead.

classes.name: sweetrpg_model_core.model.base.SimpleModel
documentation: A simple model object which includes an 'id' property.

classes.name: sweetrpg_model_core.model.base.Model
documentation:
A model object which includes an 'id' property as well as
audit fields for created, updated, and deleted times.

classes.name: sweetrpg_model_core.model.base.EmbeddedModel
documentation:
An embedded model object, meant to be contained in another model object. It does not
contain an identifier or audit fields.

classes.name: sweetrpg_model_core.schema.base.BaseSchema

methods.name: sweetrpg_model_core.schema.base.BaseSchema.handle_dates
documentation: Converts date/time value to an ISO formatted string.

methods.name: sweetrpg_model_core.schema.base.BaseSchema.make_object
documentation:
Create a model object from the provided data.

```
param data

A dictionary of data to populate the model object.

returns

An instance of the .
```

Base type for schema classes.
Inherit from this type for database schema objects to gain ID and date conversion
pre-load functionality, and to have ID and audit fields setup automatically.
